2604.15719.title: The World Leaks the Future: Harness Evolution for Future Prediction Agents
2604.15719.paper_summary: Many consequential decisions must be made before the relevant outcome is known. Such problems are commonly framed as \emph{future prediction}, where an LLM agent must form a prediction for an unresolved question using only the public information available at the prediction time. The setting is difficult because public evidence evolves while useful supervision arrives only after the question is resolved, so most existing approaches still improve mainly from final outcomes. Yet final outcomes are too coarse to guide earlier factor tracking, evidence gathering and interpretation, or uncertainty handling. When the same unresolved question is revisited over time, temporal contrasts between earlier and later predictions can expose omissions in the earlier prediction process; we call this signal \emph{internal feedback}. We introduce \emph{Milkyway}, a self-evolving agent system that keeps the base model fixed and instead updates a persistent \emph{future prediction harness} for factor tracking, evidence gathering and interpretation, and uncertainty handling. Across repeated predictions on the same unresolved question, \emph{Milkyway} extracts internal feedback and writes reusable guidance back into the harness, so later predictions on that question can improve before the outcome is known. After the question is resolved, the final outcome provides a \emph{retrospective check} before the updated harness is carried forward to subsequent questions. On FutureX and FutureWorld, Milkyway achieves the best overall score among the compared methods, improving FutureX from 44.07 to 60.90 and FutureWorld from 62.22 to 77.96.
2604.15719.paper_summary_zh: 許多重要的決策必須在相關結果已知之前做出。這類問題通常被框架為 \emph{未來預測}，在這種情況下，LLM代理必須僅使用在預測時間可用的公共信息來形成對未解決問題的預測。這種設置是困難的，因為公共證據隨著時間的推移而演變，而有用的監督僅在問題解決後到來，因此大多數現有方法仍然主要依賴於最終結果來改進。然而，最終結果過於粗略，無法指導早期的因素追蹤、證據收集和解釋或不確定性處理。當同一未解決問題隨著時間的推移被重新審視時，早期和後期預測之間的時間對比可以揭示早期預測過程中的遺漏；我們稱這種信號為 \emph{內部反饋}。我們介紹了 \emph{Milkyway}，這是一個自我演化的代理系統，保持基礎模型固定，而是更新一個持久的 \emph{未來預測工具}，用於因素追蹤、證據收集和解釋以及不確定性處理。在對同一未解決問題進行重複預測的過程中，\emph{Milkyway} 提取內部反饋並將可重用的指導寫回工具中，以便在結果已知之前，對該問題的後續預測能夠改進。在問題解決後，最終結果提供了一個 \emph{回顧檢查}，以便在更新的工具被轉移到後續問題之前進行檢查。在 FutureX 和 FutureWorld 上，Milkyway 在比較的方法中達到了最佳的整體得分，將 FutureX 從 44.07 提高到 60.90，將 FutureWorld 從 62.22 提高到 77.96。
2604.15719.author: Chuyang Wei et.al.
2604.15719.authors: Chuyang Wei, Maohang Gao, Zhixin Han, Kefei Chen, Yu Zhuang, Haoxiang Guan, Yanzhi Zhang, Yilin Cheng, Jiyan He, Huanhuan Chen, Jian Li, Yu Shi, Yitong Duan, Shuxin Zheng
